title: Young karareka excel at national karate championship
description: GEORGE NEWS - Several students of the Kigai...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Several students of the Kigai Karate Club, who represented the JKA Western Province team, participated in the annual SAJKA National Karate Championship in Johannesburg in May.


> Over 3 000 karateka competed over two long days at the Ellis Park/Standard Bank Arena.


The students did extremely well and the club congratulates them on their achievement, qualifying for Junior SAJKA national colours.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
